title: androrchis × kisslingii
intro: Androrchis × kisslingii, also known as the hybrid lady's slipper orchid, is a rare and exotic plant species resulting from the cross between Androceras longiflorum and Orchis italica. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate blood circulation, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antibacterial and antifungal activities. The health benefits associated with Androrchis × kisslingii include its potential to alleviate conditions such as arthritis, gout, and varicose veins due to its vasodilatory effects. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in infusions, decoctions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although its availability is limited due to its rarity and strict regulations surrounding its cultivation.
